name: Indonesian Ketjap Manis Sauce for Chicken Or
recipeInstructions:
1. To make homemade Ketjap manis: Caramelize 3/4 cup sugar in a heavy pot over medium heat until golden brown.
2. Gradually stir in 1 cup soy sauce, 2 tablespoons water, 1 tablespoon sliced lemon grass, 1 minced garlic clove, and 1 star anise.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Allow the sauce to cool before straining through cheesecloth into a bowl.
5. Mix well with all ingredients for the Ketjap manis sauce.
6. Makes enough for 1 pound of chicken or fish.
7. To use: Cut chicken or fish into cubes and place in a glass bowl.
8. Pour in the prepared sauce and toss to coat.
9. Let marinate for 30 minutes to 1 hour before grilling.
Ketjap manis: Caramelize 3/4 cup sugar in a heavy pot until golden brown. Gradually stir in 1 cup soy sauce, 2 tablespoons water, 1 tablespoon sliced lemon grass, 1 minced garlic clove, and 1 star anise. Bring to a boil, lower heat and simmer for 10 minutes. Cool and strain through cheesecloth. Makes about 1 1/4 cups. Store in the refrigerator.
